title: spiraea betulifolia subsp. corymbosa
intro: Spiraea betulifolia subsp. corymbosa, also known as Maybush or Korean Spiraea, is a deciduous shrub native to Korea and China. The plant is used in traditional medicine, known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Spiraea betulifolia subsp. corymbosa have been linked to several health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving symptoms of colds and flu. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes, often in combination with other herbs.
